title: sciaphila multiflora
intro: Sciaphila multiflora, also known as the night-flowering dodder, is a plant species that belongs to the family Burmanniaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing. Sciaphila multiflora is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
